seo.title: Lash Studio Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your lash or esthetics studio. Route unhappy clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Lash Studios & Estheticians

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Lash Studios & Estheticians
hero.subheading: Beautiful work doesn’t always show up online. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after the appointment without feeling pushy.

socialProof.text: Built for lash studios and estheticians

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Lash & Esthetics Studio Faces

items.heading: Clients love the look, then disappear
items.body: They’re not thinking about Google when they leave happy.

items.heading: Sensitive services make public complaints sting
items.body: One frustrated post can sit at the top of your profile.

items.heading: Asking during the service breaks the vibe
items.body: You want calm focus on the client, not a pitch.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Lash & Esthetics Studios

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after they pay.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

benefits.sectionHeading: Why Lash & Esthetics Studios Choose ReviewFlo

items.heading: Respects the appointment flow
items.body: Requests go out after the service, not mid-treatment.

items.heading: Private feedback first
items.body: You can address concerns before they become public reviews.

items.heading: One link for your whole team
items.body: Same follow-up after every visit, no extra tools.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, when you ask right after the appointment and keep it simple.
They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.
No. It’s a link by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small studios.

items.q: Can I use this at multiple locations?
items.a: Yes. Use separate links per location if needed.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Lash & Esthetics Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
